# Video file for the paper "Plumelets: Dynamic Filamentary Structures in Solar Coronal Plumes" (ApJ 2020).

Authors: DeForest, Craig
Published: 2020-11-26T04:56:21Z
Subjects: Astronomy and Astrophysics
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/FELQVX

Citation: DeForest, Craig, 2020, "Video file for the paper "Plumelets: Dynamic Filamentary Structures in Solar Coronal Plumes" (ApJ 2020).", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/FELQVX, Harvard Dataverse, V1
